sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (date_array Date ARRAY) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT date_array FROM test_array WHERE length(date_array) = 0;
UPDATE test_array SET date_array = emptyArrayDate() WHERE length(date_array) > 0;
SELECT case when length(date_array) = 0 then 'Array is empty' else 'Array is not empty' end as status FROM test_array;
